creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text: This https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=poudriere-bulk&apropos=0&sektion=8& manpath=FreeBSD+12.2-RELEASE+and+Ports&arch=default&format=html says that "-O overlays" is supported, but overlays are not in 3.3.6, but only in master of poudriere. See: https://github.com/freebsd/poudriere/blob/32cebc1a2896b314842199e3695b2fac1403c701/src/share/poudriere/bulk.sh#L37-L71
